content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

March 23, 2006

Blaise J. Jackson
Law Offices of Jeffrey G. Scott
16935 West Bernardo Drive, Suite 170
San Diego, CA 92127-1635

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-06-025

Dear Mr. Jackson:

This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission has withdrawn your February 15, 2006, request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act,1 as you requested on March 20, 2006. Consequently, no response will be prepared. Your request is withdrawn.

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Brian G. Lau
Counsel, Legal Division

BGL:rd
I:\AdviceLtrs\06-025

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
